query: SELECT o.name, o.slug, 'tasks' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM taskCompletion tc JOIN organizations o ON tc.organizationId = o.id WHERE tc.notionLastEdited IS NULL GROUP BY o.name, o.slug UNION ALL SELECT o.name, o.slug, 'validation' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM validationResults vr JOIN organizations o ON vr.organizationId = o.id WHERE vr.notionLastEdited IS NULL GROUP BY o.name, o.slug ORDER BY type, cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.name, o.slug, 'tasks' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM taskCompletion tc JOIN organizations o ON tc.organizationId = o.id WHERE tc.notionLastEdited IS NULL GROUP BY o.name, o.slug UNION ALL SELECT o.name, o.slug, 'validation' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM validationResults vr JOIN organizations o ON vr.organizationId = o.id WHERE vr.notionLastEdited IS NULL GROUP BY o.name, o.slug ORDER BY type, cnt DESC;
